data.name: System Mail
data.content: tap

data.name: Update Compensation
data.content: Dear Archmage, the update is complete. We hope it brings you a better gaming experience. Please accept our gift:

data.name: Benefits Delivery
data.content: Dear Archmage, welcome to Backpack Merge! Thank you for joining us. Please accept our gift:

data.name: Follower Gift
data.content: Dear Archmage, thank you for joining our Discord community. Here are your rewards:

data.name: Payment Failed
data.content: Dear Archmage, due to a payment failure with your subscription's linked payment method, your subscription status may be affected. Tap the following link to fix your subscription settings: <link=handler><color=#ff0000>click me!</color></link>

data.name: Purchase Delay
data.content: Dear Archmage, you purchased item #order_id# for #price#$ via #platform#. We've sent the item to you via mail. Please check the attachment.
